---
name: internal-fixture-app-store-release-notes-skill
description: Write App Store What's New text for each supported locale from one release range. Use when a release needs localized App Store copy.
---

# Internal Fixture App Store Release Notes Skill

Return output in Japanese.

## Trigger Conditions

- Draft `What's New in This Version`.
- Prepare App Store copy for each supported locale.

## Workflow

1. Resolve the requested release range.
2. Generate localized App Store release notes.
